title: Explore acoustic telemetry data
text: Aside standard graphs, geographical component telemetry data makes interactive maps particularly useful. package leaflet quite popular create kind visualizations. can example create map involved stations showing station name acoustic project code belongs pop-ups. First, retrieve coordinates stations: able produce desired map: can visualize number detections per station, n_detect_station, joining geo_info_stations: similar way can visualize number detected individuals per station, n_silurus_station: can also make map relative detection duration deployments. First, retrieve deployment geographical coordinates: ready create desired map, show deployment ID, station name network project popups: want add temporal component visualize fish movement? Take look moveVis package.
code:
geo_info_stations <- detections_silurus |> distinct( station_name, deploy_latitude, deploy_longitude, acoustic_project_code ) |> arrange(station_name) geo_info_stations ## # A tibble: 23 × 4 ## station_name deploy_latitude deploy_longitude acoustic_project_code ## ## 1 de-1 51.0 4.84 demer ## 2 de-10 51.0 5.05 demer ## 3 de-11 51.0 5.05 demer ## 4 de-12 51.0 5.06 demer ## 5 de-13 51.0 5.06 demer ## 6 de-14 51.0 5.06 demer ## 7 de-14a 51.0 5.06 demer ## 8 de-16 51.0 5.06 demer ## 9 de-18 51.0 5.07 demer ## 10 de-19 51.0 5.08 demer ## # ℹ 13 more rows leaflet(geo_info_stations) |> addTiles() |> addMarkers( lng = ~deploy_longitude, lat = ~deploy_latitude, popup = ~paste0("Station: ", station_name, " (", acoustic_project_code, ")") ) |> htmlwidgets::saveWidget(file = "stations_map.html") # Create a continuous colour palette function pal <- colorNumeric( palette = "viridis", domain = n_detect_station$n ) n_detect_station |> left_join( geo_info_stations, by = "station_name" ) |> leaflet() |> addTiles() |> addCircleMarkers( lng = ~deploy_longitude, lat = ~deploy_latitude, radius = ~log(n), color = ~pal(n), fillOpacity = 0.8, stroke = FALSE, popup = ~paste( sep = "
", paste0("Station: ", station_name, " (", acoustic_project_code, ")"), paste0("# detections: ", n) ) ) |> addLegend( title = "Detections", pal = pal, values = ~n ) |> htmlwidgets::saveWidget(file = "n_detections_per_station.html") # Create a continuous colour palette function pal <- colorNumeric( palette = "viridis", domain = n_silurus_station$n ) n_silurus_station |> left_join( geo_info_stations, by = "station_name" ) |> leaflet() |> addTiles() |> addCircleMarkers( lng = ~deploy_longitude, lat = ~deploy_latitude, radius = ~n, color = ~pal(n), fillOpacity = 0.8, stroke = FALSE, popup = ~paste( sep = "
", paste0("Station: ", station_name, " (", acoustic_project_code, ")"), paste0("# detected individuals: ", n) ) ) |> addLegend( title = "Detected individuals", pal = pal, values = ~n ) |> htmlwidgets::saveWidget(file = "n_individuals_per_station.html") geo_info_deploys <- detections_silurus |> distinct( deployment_id, deploy_latitude, deploy_longitude, station_name, acoustic_project_code ) |> arrange(station_name) geo_info_deploys ## # A tibble: 33 × 5 ## deployment_id deploy_latitude deploy_longitude station_name ## ## 1 1424 51.0 4.84 de-1 ## 2 1428 51.0 5.05 de-10 ## 3 1429 51.0 5.05 de-11 ## 4 2938 51.0 5.06 de-12 ## 5 1656 51.0 5.06 de-12 ## 6 1470 51.0 5.06 de-12 ## 7 1432 51.0 5.06 de-13 ## 8 1433 51.0 5.06 de-14 ## 9 1592 51.0 5.06 de-14 ## 10 1431 51.0 5.06 de-14a ## acoustic_project_code ## ## 1 demer ## 2 demer ## 3 demer ## 4 demer ## 5 demer ## 6 demer ## 7 demer ## 8 demer ## 9 demer ## 10 demer ## # ℹ 23 more rows # Create a continuous colour palette function pal <- colorNumeric( palette = "viridis", domain = rel_det_duration_silurus$relative_detection_duration ) rel_det_duration_silurus |> left_join( geo_info_deploys, by = c("deployment_id", "station_name") ) |> leaflet() |> addTiles() |> addCircleMarkers( lng = ~deploy_longitude, lat = ~deploy_latitude, radius = ~100 * relative_detection_duration, color = ~pal(relative_detection_duration), fillOpacity = 0.8, stroke = FALSE, clusterOptions = markerClusterOptions(), popup = ~paste( sep = "
", paste0("DeploymentID: ", deployment_id), paste0("Station: ", station_name, " (", acoustic_project_code, ")"), paste0("# relative detection duration: ", round(relative_detection_duration, 2)) ) ) |> addLegend( title = "Relative detection duration", pal = pal, values = ~relative_detection_duration ) |> htmlwidgets::saveWidget(file = "relative_detection_duration.html")

what: Where do you find your credentials?
title: Configure credentials
text: Go ETN Data Platform. Log MarinePass account. top right, click name, choose ETN R access. See credentials connect ETN database. Use next section “Store credentials”. Note password different one MarinePass account.

title: Configure credentials
text: default, functions ask credentials. tedious! can avoid storing local .Renviron file. etn use rather asking every time. Open .Renviron file : Add following lines file save: Restart R. Try:
code: # install.packages("usethis") usethis::edit_r_environ() ETN_USER = "your email address" ETN_PWD = "your password" library(etn) get_animal_projects() # This should return a data frame

title: Configure credentials
text: Forgot credentials MarinePass account? Use password reset form. Forgot credentials connect ETN database? See section “find credentials?”.

what: Don’t have an account to ETN?
title: Configure credentials
text: Register MarinePass account. grants access several services VLIZ: Marine Data Archive ETN Data Platform. can request additional access ETN RStudio server. Select access ETN_data (optional) rstudio_etn. Confirm registration via email. Wait email indicating account approved human.

title: Options
text: temporarily set option duration R session, use: store option permanently, open .Renviron file usethis::edit_r_environ(), edit, save:
code: Sys.setenv(ETN_PROTOCOL = "opencpu") # Retrieve with Sys.getenv("ETN_PROTOCOL") ETN_PROTOCOL = "opencpu"

title: Options
text: ETN_USER: username ETN database. See authentication. ETN_PWD: password ETN database. See authentication. ETN_PROTOCOL (value: "opencpu" "localdb"): etn automatically detect best connect ETN database, .e. use local database connection available. option allows override behaviour hardcoding protocol use. ETN_TEST_API (value: url) developers : etn uses production version OpenCPU API default. option allows use test version OpenCPU API (available upon request). value break package.

what: Access Data from the European Tracking Network
title: Access Data from the European Tracking Network
text: etn R package access data European Tracking Network (ETN). etn can query metadata (animals, tags, deployments, receivers, projects) data (acoustic detections, sensor data) ETN database use analyses. Data access requires user credentials subject data policy. get started, see: Configure credentials. Function reference: overview functions. Explore acoustic telemetry data.

title: Download acoustic data package — download_acoustic_dataset
text: download_acoustic_dataset() deprecated. Please use get_package() instead, versatile, adds field definitions, returns Data Package object can passed functions. Note get_package() support filtering scientific_name print summary statistics.   function allows download acoustic data related animal project data package can deposited research data repository. Includes option filter scientific names. data downloaded Frictionless Data Package containing: function report number records per csv file, well included scientific names acoustic projects. Warnings raised : Animals multiple tags Tags associated multiple animals Deployments without acoustic project: deployments listed deployments.csv therefore raise foreign key validation error. Duplicate detections: detections duplicate detection_id. removed function detections.csv. Important: data downloaded database, .e. quality consistency checks performed function. therefore recommend verify data publication. consistency check can performed validation tools Frictionless Framework, e.g. frictionless validate datapackage.json command line using frictionless-py.
code: # Before download_acoustic_dataset(animal_project_code = "2012_leopoldkanaal")  # Now my_package <- get_package(animal_project_code = "2012_leopoldkanaal") write_package(my_package, directory = "2012_leopoldkanaal")

Required. scientific_name Character (vector). One scientific names. Defaults (scientific names, include "Sync tag", etc.). directory Character. Relative path local download directory. code: get_acoustic_detections(   connection,   start_date = NULL,   end_date = NULL,   tag_serial_number = NULL,   acoustic_tag_id = NULL,   animal_project_code = NULL,   scientific_name = NULL,   acoustic_project_code = NULL,   receiver_id = NULL,   station_name = NULL,   limit = FALSE,   progress = TRUE )

title: Get acoustic detections data — get_acoustic_detections
text: connection connection ETN database. argument longer used. prompted credentials instead. start_date Character. Start date (inclusive) ISO 8601 format ( yyyy-mm-dd, yyyy-mm yyyy). end_date Character. End date (exclusive) ISO 8601 format ( yyyy-mm-dd, yyyy-mm yyyy). tag_serial_number Character (vector). One acoustic tag serial numbers. acoustic_tag_id Character (vector). One acoustic tag ids. animal_project_code Character (vector). One animal project codes. Case-insensitive. scientific_name Character (vector). One scientific names. acoustic_project_code Character (vector). One acoustic project codes. Case-insensitive. receiver_id Character (vector). One receiver identifiers. station_name Character (vector). One deployment station names. limit Logical. Limit number returned records 100 (useful testing purposes). Defaults FALSE. progress Logical. Show progress bar fetching data. Defaults TRUE.

title: Transform a Data Package with ETN data to a Darwin Core Archive — write_dwc
text: function follows recommendations discussed created Peter Desmet, Jonas Mortelmans, Jonathan Pye, John Wieczorek others transforms data : Occurrence core. Extended Measurement Facts extension meta.xml file. Key features Darwin Core transformation: Deployments (animal+tag associations) parent events, capture, surgery, release, recapture (human observations) acoustic detections (machine observations) child events. information parent event provided ID, meaning data can expressed Occurrence Core one row per observation parentEventID shared occurrences deployment. release event often contains metadata animal (sex, life stage, comments) deployment whole. Sex, life stage weight (additionally) provided Extended Measurement Facts extension, values mapped controlled vocabulary recommended OBIS. Acoustic detections downsampled first detection per hour, reduce size high-frequency data. coordinateUncertaintyInMeters set 1000 m account imprecise receiver location acoustic detection range. Duplicate detections (animal, tag timestamp) excluded. possible deployment contain detections, e.g. tag malfunctioned right deployment. Parameters metadata used set following record-level terms: dwc:datasetID: dataset_id, defaulting package$id. dwc:datasetName: dataset_name. dcterms:license: license. dcterms:rightsHolder: rights_holder.

title: etn (development version)
text: Add European Union funder (STRAITS) (#497). get_acoustic_projects(), get_animal_projects() get_cpod_projects() now optional argument citation, adds columns citation, doi, contact_name, contact_email contact_affiliation data frame. makes easier cite projects contact responsible. citation information obtained via MarineInfo (#518). New example_dataset() reads example dataset ("2014_DEMER") Data Package (#530). New get_package() gets data related animal project Data Package. Use combination write_package() download dataset (#544). read_package() write_package() reexported frictionless read write Data Packages (#525). download_acoustic_dataset() deprecated. Please use get_package() write_package() instead (#559). function writes output file occurrence.csv (previously dwc_occurrence.csv) adds meta.xml file. dwc:institutionCode always set "VLIZ" maintainer ETN. institution_code parameter removed. dc:license set "CC--4.0" "CC0-1.0" rather URL. input license parameter updated accordingly. dwc:identificationVerificationStatus added set "verified expert" records, since taxon assumed well-known tag attached. animal sex, life stage weight added Extended Measurement Facts extension file (emof.csv), better support OBIS (#555). function reference reorganized (#549)

title: etn 3.0.0
text: etn now connects ETN database API provided etnservice package (#280). means can use package computer. Note slower running ETN RStudio server. etn automatically switch local database connection available (e.g. ETN RStudio server). Use Sys.setenv(ETN_PROTOCOL = "opencpu") override behaviour force package use API (#398). Queries via API ETN RStudio Server return results (#317). using local database connection, etn check installed helper package etnservice used place queries date one deployed via API. ensure queries placed via API via local database connection always result consistent results. installed version etnservice older, prompted install newer version (#385).

title: etn 3.0.0

New authentication mechanism (#317, #339, #338, #228). New vignette vignette("authentication"). connection argument deprecated functions (#301). connect_to_etn() deprecated (#303). can migrate: Use new ETN RStudio server (https://rstudio.europeantrackingnetwork.org). title: etn 3.0.0
text: get_acoustic_detections() now uses different protocol retrieve data. can now reliably return 10M+ detections without timeouts (#384, #382, #323). get_acoustic_detections() now returns progress bar large queries (#384). get_acoustic_detections() now deployment_id filter argument (#382, #340). get_acoustic_detections() now tag_serial_number argument, reliable acoustic_tag_id (still supported). Thanks @lottepohl suggestion (#408, #386). get_acoustic_detections() may return fewer (erroneous) detections , due fixes database. get_animals() now includes type_type = "archival" data (#365).

title: etn 3.0.0
text: New vignette vignette("options") describes developer options (#398). Contributors can change default domain API URL test server via environmental variable ETN_TEST_API (#383). Tests make use vcr record replay HTTP requests API. results stored /tests/fixtures (#432). Tests new helper functions, including skip_if_not_localdb(), skip_if_http_error() expect_protocol_agnostic(). latter used compare SQL vs API calls test-protocol_agnostic.R (#436). Tests download_acoustic_datasets() updated archival tags SQL vs API calls makes use markdown snapshots (#366). pkgdown website now automatically build GitHub Action served gh-pages branch. docs/ directory removed (#456). vignette("acoustic-telemetry") precompiled vignettes/precompile.R, doesn’t run every build (#473).

title: etn 3.0.0

Previously deprecated functions get_deployments(), get_detections(), get_projects(), get_receivers(), list_network_project_codes() now removed. vignette("etn_fields") outdated removed (#468).
